heading: GENERAL PROVISIONS
label: I GENERAL PROVISIONS
notes: CodificationA new organic act, or basic charter of civil government, for the people of the Virgin Islands of the United States, was passed in 1954. , , known as the Revised Organic Act of the Virgin Islands, is set out as section 1541 et seq. of this title. Section 8(c) of the Revised Organic Act, set out as , provides that laws of the United States, set out generally in this chapter, as well as local laws and ordinances, including provisions of the Organic Act of the Virgin Islands of the United States, , , section 1405 et seq. of this title, in force on , and not inconsistent with act , are to remain in force and effect until otherwise changed.Act July 22, 1954, ch. 55868 Stat. 497section 1574(c) of this titleact June 22, 1936, ch. 69949 Stat. 1807July 22, 1954July 22, 1954
Additional ProvisionsFor additional provisions, constituting a revision of the Organic Act of the Virgin Islands of the United States, see section 1541 et seq. of this title.
Delegate to Congress From Virgin IslandsProvisions respecting representation in Congress by a Delegate from Virgin Islands to the House of Representatives, see section 1711 et seq. of this title.
